titles.title: Enhancing Long-Term, Efficient, and Viable Alternatives to Empower Flood-Prone Communities Act of 2026
Enhancing Long-Term, Efficient, and Viable Alternatives to Empower Flood-Prone Communities Act of 2026
A bill to provide for planning and implementation of nonstructural flood risk management solutions, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
